pi_items.source: Task description line: 'Create a channel named exactly `Patient_Notification_API`.'
HL7v2 message sample data (PID-3.1): Extracted from synthetic message in setup_task.sh. Segment: PID|1||PAT78432^^^MYHOSPITAL^MR||...
HL7v2 message sample data (PID-5.2): Extracted from synthetic message in setup_task.sh. Segment: PID|...|MARTINEZ^ELENA^R||...
HL7v2 message sample data (PID-5.1): Extracted from synthetic message in setup_task.sh. Segment: PID|...|MARTINEZ^ELENA^R||...
HL7v2 message sample data (PID-7): Extracted from synthetic message in setup_task.sh. Segment: PID|...|19780622|F|...
HL7v2 message sample data (MSH-9.2): Extracted from synthetic message in setup_task.sh. Segment: MSH|...|ADT^A01^ADT_A01|...

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a NextGen Connect channel named 'Patient_Notification_API' that transforms HL7 ADT messages into JSON and sends them to http://webhook-server:8888/api/patient-notification. The expected JSON payload contains: mrn='PAT78432', firstName='ELENA', lastName='MARTINEZ', dateOfBirth='19780622', and eventType='A01'. These values are extracted from a synthetic HL7v2 sample message containing patient admission data, with values mapped from standard HL7 field locations (PID-3.1, PID-5.2, PID-5.1, PID-7, MSH-9.2 respectively).
